text:
Created attachment 154816
poudriere failed build log

mail/tpop3d fails to build with GDBMAUTH=on, please see the attached poudriere log.

checking for gdbm.h... no
configure: error: GNU dbm authentication enabled but can't find gdbm.h 
===>  Script "configure" failed unexpectedly.
Please report the problem to ports@FreeBSD.org [maintainer] and attach the
"/wrkdirs/usr/ports/mail/tpop3d/work/tpop3d-1.5.5/config.log" including the
output of the failure of your make command. Also, it might be a good idea to
provide an overview of all packages installed on your system (e.g. a
/usr/local/sbin/pkg-static info -g -Ea).
*** [do-configure] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/tpop3d.
